hero.title: Senior AI & Web Developer
hero.subtitle: Building intelligent systems and automated workflows with 10 years of experience.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: For over a decade, I've been immersed in the world of software development, specializing in creating intelligent, automated, and robust web systems. My journey has taken me from building scalable backend architectures to pioneering AI-driven solutions that solve real-world problems.
about.p2: My expertise lies at the intersection of Artificial Intelligence, workflow automation, and full-stack web development. I'm passionate about writing clean, efficient code and architecting systems that are not only powerful but also maintainable and a joy to work with. I thrive on tackling complex challenges and turning innovative ideas into tangible, high-impact products.

projects.title: My Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of projects that showcase my passion for technology and problem-solving.
projects.p1_desc: A scalable e-commerce solution with a personalized recommendation engine, increasing user engagement by 30%.
projects.p2_desc: A dynamic dashboard for visualizing complex data streams, providing actionable insights for business intelligence.
projects.p3_desc: A tool that automates repetitive business processes, saving over 20 hours of manual work per week.

skills.title: My Skills
skills.subtitle: The technologies and tools I use to bring ideas to life.

contact.title: Contact Me
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind or want to connect? Drop me a line.
contact.name: Name

validation.name_min: Name must be at least 2 characters.
validation.message_min: Message must be at least 10 characters.
